end end end end end Z=#R return o(S)end,function()w=(-667462+667463)+w F[w]=-636515-(-636516)return w end,function(z,L)local o=r(L)local d=function(d)return Z(z,{d},L,o)end return d end,{}return(C(13223340-384689,{}))(o(S))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[L(1028057-1022104)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
